rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from BBID. Waiver pickup rule: 35% of current-year salary (8,000 x 35%). Applied to 2021 because the drop occurred on or after the 2020 FreeAgent auction start (2020-08-17). Review only: post-auction carryover row is using local fallback contract inference instead of a live salaryAdjustments drop marker. Live salaryAdjustments feed was unavailable for this build.
rows.status_detail: Review only: post-auction carryover row is using local fallback contract inference instead of a live salaryAdjustments drop marker.

rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from FREE_AGENT. Projected current-rule penalty: 75% of TCV is 6,000; earned to date is 4,000. Applied to 2021 because the drop occurred on or after the 2020 FreeAgent auction start (2020-08-17). Review only: post-auction carryover row is using local fallback contract inference instead of a live salaryAdjustments drop marker. Live salaryAdjustments feed was unavailable for this build.
rows.status_detail: Review only: post-auction carryover row is using local fallback contract inference instead of a live salaryAdjustments drop marker.
